column2: NAME
DESCRIPTION
Show Inheritance Laws
Show the inheritance laws cheat menu.
Hide Inheritance Laws
Hide the inheritance laws cheat menu.
----Set Succession: Elective Gavelkind
Sets your primary title's succession law to Elective Gavelkind. Children of the ruler vote on the heir from among themselves – remaining children inherit secondary titles.
----Set Succession: Elective Monarchy
Sets your primary title's succession law to Elective Monarchy. Vassals vote on the heir – the realm stays intact across succession.
----Set Succession: Eldership
Sets your primary title's succession law to Eldership. The eldest member of your dynasty inherits. Holy Fury content – gated to Baltic / West African pagan tribal realms in vanilla.
----Set Succession: Gavelkind
Sets your primary title's succession law to Gavelkind. Titles divide between all eligible children – the realm fragments at succession.
----Set Succession: Open
Sets your primary title's succession law to Open (Turkish). Any qualifying member of your dynasty can succeed – vassals push competing claimants. Default for Muslim realms.
----Set Succession: Primogeniture
Sets your primary title's succession law to Primogeniture. Eldest child inherits everything. Stable succession but encourages younger siblings to rebel.
----Set Succession: Seniority
Sets your primary title's succession law to Seniority. Eldest member of your dynasty inherits, regardless of relation.
----Set Succession: Tanistry
Sets your primary title's succession law to Tanistry. Dynasty members vote on the heir. Gated to Celtic culture group in vanilla.
----Set Succession: Ultimogeniture
Sets your primary title's succession law to Ultimogeniture. Youngest child inherits everything. Niche – engine restricts to Mongol culture or Bon religion in vanilla.
----Set Gender: Absolute Cognatic
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Absolute Cognatic. Eldest child of either sex inherits equally.
----Set Gender: Agnatic
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Agnatic. Males only – females cannot inherit or transmit claims.
----Set Gender: Agnatic-Cognatic
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Agnatic-Cognatic. Males preferred – females inherit only if no male heirs exist.
----Set Gender: Enatic
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Enatic. Females only – mirror of Agnatic. Requires matriarchal religion feature.
----Set Gender: Enatic-Cognatic
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Enatic-Cognatic. Females preferred – males inherit only if no female heirs exist. Mirror of Agnatic-Cognatic.
----Set Succession: Open Elective
Sets your primary title's succession law to Open Elective. The order's membership votes on the next leader. Default for Holy Orders.
----Set Succession: Nomadic
Sets your primary title's succession law to Nomadic. Engine default for Nomadic government. Requires Horse Lords.
----Set Succession: Patrician Elective
Sets your primary title's succession law to Patrician Elective. Patrician family heads vote. Engine default for Merchant Republics. Requires The Republic.
----Set Gender: Absolute Cognatic (Hidden)
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Absolute Cognatic.
----Set Gender: Agnatic (Hidden)
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Agnatic.
----Set Gender: Agnatic-Cognatic (Hidden)
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Agnatic-Cognatic.
Iqta governments don't display gender succession in vanilla's Inheritance UI, but the engine still applies the law.
Holy Orders don't display gender succession in vanilla's Inheritance UI, but the engine still applies the law.
Merchant Republics don't display gender succession in vanilla's Inheritance UI, but the engine still applies the law.
----Set Gender: Enatic (Hidden)
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Enatic.
----Set Gender: Enatic-Cognatic (Hidden)
Sets your primary title's gender succession to Enatic-Cognatic.
----Set Succession: Byzantine Elective
Sets your primary title's succession law to Byzantine Elective. Family elections decide the heir.
----Set Succession: Princely Elective
Sets your primary title's succession law to Princely Elective. Imperial electors vote on a successor from feudal vassals.
